title: Quantum Lab
description: From-scratch quantum lab in TypeScript with FIVE simulation engines: state-vector, density-matrix, stabilizer-tableau (Clifford circuits to 30 qubits), a Matrix Product State tensor network with a from-scratch complex SVD, and an exact free-fermion (Jordan–Wigner + Bogoliubov) solver for the transverse-field Ising chain — running arbitrary circuits on 40 qubits in O(n·χ²) memory with error-tracked bond truncation, perfect sampling and per-cut entanglement entropy. On top of the tensor network: TEBD real-time dynamics of the Ising chain (quench light-cone, matched to exact), and full two-site DMRG — Matrix Product Operators + incremental environments + a matrix-free Lanczos eigensolver finding the ground state of the Ising and Heisenberg/XXZ chains, matching exact diagonalisation to ~1e-13 with a vanishing ⟨H²⟩−⟨H⟩² eigenstate certificate at lengths far past exact diag, plus a phase-transition scan that locates quantum critical points from the ground-state entanglement peak. And now TOPOLOGICAL ERROR CORRECTION: the rotated surface code [[d²,1,d]] with a real Minimum-Weight Perfect Matching decoder — a faithful from-scratch implementation of Edmonds' blossom algorithm (Galil's O(V³) primal-dual matching, verified against brute force) running on a graph of lit-up parity checks weighted by lattice distance. Inject X/Z errors on an interactive lattice and watch the checks fire, the matching form, and the residual be classified as a stabilizer or a logical failure; a Monte-Carlo sweep reproduces the ≈10.3% error-correction threshold where the distance-3/5/7 curves cross. And now FAULT TOLERANCE IN SPACE-TIME: a phenomenological noise model with T repeated noisy syndrome rounds decoded on a 3-D space-time matching graph (time edges absorb measurement errors), a from-scratch Union-Find decoder (Delfosse–Nivelle: near-linear cluster growth + peeling, cross-checked against MWPM), the phenomenological threshold (~3%), and finite-size scaling — the Λ = p_L(d)/p_L(d+2) suppression factor plus a universal data collapse that fits (p_th, ν). And now AN EXACT FREE-FERMION ENGINE: the transverse-field Ising chain is secretly free, so the Jordan–Wigner transform + a Bogoliubov–de Gennes diagonalisation (which is literally a singular-value decomposition of an n×n matrix, reusing the same from-scratch complex SVD) solve it EXACTLY in O(n³) at hundreds of sites the 2ⁿ vector cannot hold and DMRG only approximates — an exact oracle that reproduces the lab's own TFIM ground energy from exact diagonalisation to machine precision and then runs far past it. It gives the Bogoliubov spectrum and ground energy E₀=−½ΣΛ_k, the quasiparticle gap 2|J−h| closing at the quantum critical point h=J, block entanglement from the ground state's MAJORANA COVARIANCE matrix (Peschel) that recovers the Ising-CFT central charge c=½ via a Calabrese–Cardy fit, a ground energy per site matching the closed-form Pfeuty thermodynamic integral, and an exact real-time QUENCH whose Gaussian correlation matrices evolve in O(n³) per step — reproducing the entanglement light-cone at sizes whose Schmidt rank 2^S no MPS or exact simulator could store, every small-n step cross-checked against exact dense evolution. And now DYNAMICAL QUANTUM PHASE TRANSITIONS: the engine, generalised to the anisotropic XY chain (the Ising point is γ=1) and solved in momentum space with periodic boundaries, makes the headline non-equilibrium effect of the decade exactly tractable — quench across the critical point and the Loschmidt return-rate function l(t)=−lim(1/N)ln|⟨ψ₀|e^{−iH_f t}|ψ₀⟩|² develops non-analytic CUSPS in real time (Heyl–Polkovnikov–Kehrein) at the critical times tₙ*=(2n+1)π/εₖ*, with an integer DYNAMICAL TOPOLOGICAL ORDER PARAMETER ν_D(t) (the Pancharatnam geometric-phase winding, Budich–Heyl) that is 0 before the first cusp and jumps by exactly +1 at each — both cross-checked to ~1e-14 against an independent dense 2ⁿ time evolution — plus the XY phase diagram and the exact mutual information between disjoint blocks. And now SHOR'S ALGORITHM: integer factoring by quantum order-finding, built from scratch end to end — to factor N, find the period r of x ↦ a·x mod N by phase-estimating the eigenphase s/r of the modular-multiplication unitary, then recover r with a continued fraction so gcd(a^(r/2)±1, N) are real factors. Two independent quantum circuits (a full (n+t)-qubit register with controlled modular multipliers + an inverse QFT, and the hardware-friendly iterative one-ancilla variant with classical feedback) are graded against an exact closed-form Dirichlet-kernel distribution to machine precision, and the Shor tab actually factors 15, 21, 33, 35… live with an order-finding spectrum, the continued-fraction reconstruction, and a factor tree. And now THE ONE-WAY QUANTUM COMPUTER: measurement-based quantum computation built from scratch — no gates, just a fixed entangled CLUSTER STATE measured qubit-by-qubit in adaptive single-qubit bases. A faithful measurement calculus (Danos–Kashefi–Panangaden: N/E/M commands with feed-forward angles φ=(−1)^{sX}α+sZπ) and a universal {J(α),CZ} compiler turn any single-qubit unitary (via its Euler angles) and CNOT into a cluster + measurement schedule, propagating the Pauli byproduct operators symbolically; a dynamic state-vector engine frees every qubit the instant it is measured, so a computation of any depth keeps a live register no bigger than the number of logical wires (a deep two-wire circuit spreads across dozens of physical qubits but never holds more than three). The headline — determinism from randomness — is verified to machine precision: every run records different measurement outcomes, yet undoing the known byproduct frame yields a byte-for-byte identical logical state, cross-checked against an independent dense circuit-model oracle over hundreds of random inputs and outcome strings; cluster states are shown to be the graph states stabilised by K_v=X_v∏Z_w. And now FAULT-TOLERANT UNIVERSALITY — the two ideas that let a Clifford-only machine run an arbitrary computation. THE SOLOVAY–KITAEV ALGORITHM compiles any single-qubit gate into a word over the discrete fault-tolerant set {H,T,T†,S,S†,X,Y,Z} to precision ε in O(log^c(1/ε)) gates: a precomputed ε₀-net of short words seeds a recursion that writes the leftover error as a balanced GROUP COMMUTATOR Δ=VWV†W† (the Dawson–Nielsen construction, axis–angle algebra only, no eigensolver) whose factors are √-closer to the identity, so the error contracts super-linearly ε_n≈c·ε_{n−1}^{3/2} and depth 3–5 reaches 10⁻³–10⁻⁶ — every compiled word is multiplied back out in genuine U(2) to confirm it reproduces the target up to global phase, with the all-important T-count reported. MAGIC-STATE DISTILLATION then manufactures the non-Clifford T gates SK consumes: the Bravyi–Kitaev 15-to-1 routine on the [[15,1,3]] Reed–Muller code, whose error analysis reduces exactly to the classical [15,11,3] Hamming code — post-select on a trivial X-syndrome, fail only on an odd-weight codeword, and because the code has distance 3 with exactly 35 weight-3 logicals the output obeys the cubic law p_out=35p³ below a threshold p*≈14.2%, so cascading drives the error to zero doubly-exponentially; the exact code enumeration is cross-checked against a Monte-Carlo of the post-selected protocol. And now TWO-QUBIT GATE SYNTHESIS — the two-qubit dual of Solovay–Kitaev. A real machine has only single-qubit rotations and ONE entangler (the CNOT), so the KAK (CARTAN) DECOMPOSITION of SU(4), built from scratch, lowers any two-qubit gate onto that basis: every gate factors as U=e^{iφ}(A₀⊗A₁)·exp(i(cx XX+cy YY+cz ZZ))·(B₀⊗B₁), recovered by the magic-basis trick (Kraus–Cirac/Makhlin) — in the Bell basis a single-qubit pair becomes a real orthogonal matrix and the interaction becomes diagonal, so Ũ=O₁FO₂ is extracted by a real SIMULTANEOUS DIAGONALISATION of the commuting real and imaginary parts of ŨŨᵀ, robust even through the degenerate spectra of CNOT and iSWAP. The three numbers (cx,cy,cz) are a COMPLETE LOCAL INVARIANT living in the WEYL CHAMBER, and they dictate the geometric MINIMUM CNOT COUNT (0 local · 1 the CNOT corner · 2 the cz=0 face — iSWAP/√iSWAP/the Berkeley B gate · 3 the interior — SWAP/√SWAP/a generic gate); the canonical interaction is realised by the optimal three-CNOT Vatan–Williams circuit whose angles read straight off the coordinates, synthesising any gate into {Rz,Ry,CNOT} to ~1e-12. Then the loop closes: every single-qubit gate is compiled by Solovay–Kitaev into a {H,T} word, so an arbitrary two-qubit gate becomes a fault-tolerant {H,T,CNOT} circuit with a total T-count — the magic-state budget. The 2-Qubit Synthesis tab decomposes CNOT/CZ/iSWAP/√iSWAP/√SWAP/B/SWAP/random SU(4), plots the gate's address in the Weyl-chamber tetrahedron, shows the Makhlin local invariants G₁,G₂ (CNOT (0,1), iSWAP (0,−1), SWAP (−1,−3)), draws the synthesised circuit, and compiles the fault-tolerant version live. And now n-QUBIT GATE SYNTHESIS — the QUANTUM SHANNON DECOMPOSITION (Shende–Bullock–Markov), the n-qubit generalisation of the 1- and 2-qubit synthesis, built from scratch. Its structure theorem is the COSINE–SINE DECOMPOSITION: partition a 2ⁿ×2ⁿ unitary by its top qubit into four 2ⁿ⁻¹ blocks and it factors as U=diag(L0,L1)·[[C,−S],[S,C]]·diag(R0†,R1†) — two block-diagonal quantum multiplexors around a central [[C,−S],[S,C]] that is exactly a uniformly-controlled Rʏ (C=cos θ, S=sin θ), recovered from two block SVDs (Hermitian eig of the Gram matrix) plus an orthonormal completion, with cos²+sin²=1 and unitary blocks. Each multiplexor diag(A,B) then DEMULTIPLEXES as (I⊗V)·(uniformly-controlled R_z)·(I⊗W) via the EIGENDECOMPOSITION OF THE UNITARY A·B† — new machinery built by simultaneously diagonalising its two commuting Hermitian parts (W+W†)/2 and (W−W†)/2i, robust through the repeated eigenvalues of structured gates — leaving two (n−1)-qubit gates to RECURSE on plus three uniformly-controlled rotations, each lowered to the optimal 2ⁿ⁻¹ CNOTs by the Gray-code/Walsh–Hadamard angle transform (Möttönen). The base case is the 1-qubit ZYZ. The whole synthesis reproduces ANY gate to machine precision (~1e-11 at 5 qubits) at exactly (¾)·4ⁿ−3·2ⁿ⁻¹ CNOTs — 6/36/168/720 for n=2…5 — while a peephole optimiser (adjacent-CNOT cancellation + rotation fusion) collapses structured gates (QFT, Toffoli, Fredkin, Grover diffusion, modular adders) far below that bound, a generic Haar SU(2ⁿ) sitting exactly on it. The n-Qubit Synthesis tab draws the {Rz,Ry,CNOT} circuit, the per-level recursion summing to the closed form, the ¾·4ⁿ cost curve with the gate marked, and — closing the loop with Solovay–Kitaev — the fault-tolerant {H,T,CNOT} compile with a total T-count, the magic-state bill of universality. And now DEVICE-INDEPENDENT QUANTUM INFORMATION: the pillar that turns nonlocality into a resource and a security primitive — trust NOTHING about the boxes' internal physics, only the observed statistics. Its centrepiece is a from-scratch SEMIDEFINITE-PROGRAMMING solver (Burer–Monteiro low-rank primal over the elliptope + an eigenvalue-penalised dual, both on the lab's own Jacobi eigensolver), with which the NAVASCUÉS–PIRONIO–ACÍN hierarchy (level 1) computes Tsirelson's bound S ≤ 2√2 as a CERTIFIED CEILING — the moment matrix Γ of operator inner products is necessarily PSD, so maximising the Bell functional over Γ ⪰ 0, diag = 1 upper-bounds EVERY quantum strategy in any dimension (where the earlier Monte-Carlo only sampled qubit strategies, this proves the ceiling), primal and dual meeting at 2√2 with a ~1e-8 duality gap. An independent OPERATOR SUM-OF-SQUARES certificate 2√2·I − S = (1/√2)(u²+v²) is verified to be the exact zero matrix — a second, basis-independent proof needing no numerics. Then the consequences: DEVICE-INDEPENDENT RANDOMNESS (an observed S certifies P_guess = ½ + ½√(2−S²/4) against any adversary who built the devices, so the min-entropy climbs from 0 bits at S=2 to 1 full bit at 2√2); EPR STEERING, the asymmetric middle of the hierarchy, with the steering ellipsoid (Jevtic et al.) drawn live and the CJWR inequalities S_n=(1/√n)|Σ⟨AₖBₖ⟩|≤1 violated up to S₂=√2, S₃=√3 with the Werner critical visibility w>1/√n; the DETECTION LOOPHOLE, where the maximally-entangled CH threshold η>2(√2−1)≈82.8% drops toward Eberhard's η>2/3 for non-maximally-entangled states (minimising η*=M/Q over the measurements); and the POPESCU–ROHRLICH box, the no-signalling correlation reaching the algebraic maximum S=4, placing quantum theory's 2√2 strictly between the local 2 and what causality alone allows. Also: Kraus noise, a complex Hermitian eigensolver, Bloch spheres, Schmidt decomposition, error-correcting codes (bit/phase-flip, 9-qubit Shor, Steane [[7,1,3]] with live syndrome decoding), phase estimation, VQE with analytic parameter-shift gradients & QAOA, randomized benchmarking, OpenQASM export, and a 151-case self-test suite cross-checking every engine against exact references.
